column2: Beverley Blinds' own band assignment per fabric, for Vertical and Roller blinds - sourced directly from their Feb 2026 price list. IMPORTANT: Beverley has NO trade discount at all (confirmed) - list price = Solara cost. Where a fabric brand here (Decora, Eclipse, Louvolite, Lifestyle) is also stocked directly from Decora, compare bands/prices before ordering - the same fabric can sit in a different band (and therefore a different price) at each supplier. Beverley's actual £ price grids are not yet in this workbook - see Notes / Improvements. This tab currently only tells you the BAND, not the price.
